name: mcp-realtime-context
description: Production-grade MCP server system for real-time shared AI context

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd shared-types && npm install && cd ../mcp-server && npm install && cd ../mcp-cli && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd shared-types && npm run build && cd ../mcp-server && npm run build && cd ../mcp-cli && npm run build
scripts.dev: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && cd mcp-server && npm run dev

author: Your Name
